name: Kill The Climbers
short_description: A retro roguelite arcade game where you play as a mountain and its yeti, defending the peak from pesky climbers! Harness quick wits, skillshot-slinging abilities, and animal defenders to KILL THE CLIMBERS!
detailed_description:
A majestic mountain and its loyal yeti have had enough of reckless climbers littering their sacred slopes with garbage, frozen corpses, and endless prancing on the peak. It’s time to take a stand against this existential threat—your mission is simple: Kill The Climbers!

Key Features:

  • Choose Your Defender: Play as the mighty mountain or its fierce yeti, each with a unique playstyle to master!

  • Unleash Nature’s Fury: As the mountain, summon rockslides and gusts of wind to sweep climbers away—or fling deadly snowballs as the yeti!

  • Avalanche Power: Overwhelmed? Trigger the devastating Avalanche ability to wipe the screen clean!

  • Quick, Intense Runs: Dive into super-fast 15-minute sessions—perfect for a coffee break!

  • Endless Climber Chaos: Face thousands of climbers, including unique types with diverse strengths and weaknesses to exploit!

  • Survive the Waves: Endure 60-second waves, taking down as many climbers as you can!

  • Grow Stronger: Upgrade your abilities, defenses, and power through in-game progression and meta unlocks!

Join the fight to protect the peak in this retro arcade showdown—will your mountain prevail?
